## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New tool / feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / internal
- [ ] 🔧 CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv lock --check` passes
- [ ] `uv build` and `uvx twine check dist/*` pass for packaging changes
- [ ] New tools are added to `EXPECTED_TOOLS` in the tests
- [ ] Docstrings describe what the tool does, its parameters, and its return value
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
